'''Liat Tsayv''' was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for the organizations of [[Booster Terrik|Booster]] and [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]]. As of [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], he was the copilot of their ship, ''[[Pulsar Skate]]''. Mirax Terrik was quoted saying that he fell madly in love with and [[Marriage/Legends|married]] one of the refugees that he helped transport from [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] though she herself was not sure if they were wed.

==Appearances==
